title: Uruguayan-Style Smoky Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish made with smoky chicken and a blend of Uruguayan spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chorizo sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Sprinkle with garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Continue cooking until the chicken is cooked through, about 10-12 minutes.
Stir in cilantro and serve hot.
